MY_HERO.TITLE: A new vision for your facility with SECO GROUPE
MY_HERO.DESC: At SECO GROUPE, we don't just see a building; we see an opportunity to create a smarter, more resilient, and connected space that delivers real value.

PARTNERSHIP.TITLE: Partnership is at the core of our business.
PARTNERSHIP.DESC1: Your facility is a vital asset, and your vision is our blueprint. At SECO GROUPE, we work alongside you to transform your most critical infrastructure into modern, efficient, and healthy environments.
PARTNERSHIP.DESC2: We provide a single point of contact and accountability, making it simple for you to achieve your goals while focusing on what matters most.

MAP.TITLE: Where We Operate
MAP.DESC: We deliver our premium services across multiple countries worldwide

EXPERTISE.TITLE: Expertise designed to meet your needs.
EXPERTISE.DESC: Your facility's unique challenges require a tailored approach. Our diverse team at SECO GROUPE provides comprehensive, integrated services that ensure your building performs at its best throughout its entire lifecycle.

FACILITY.TITLE: Facility Management
FACILITY.DESC: From the grounds to the interior, we create pristine, safe, and professional environments. Our management solutions handle every detail, so you can focus on your core business.
FACILITY.CLEANING_DESC: We manage all daily and scheduled upkeep to keep your space spotless and running smoothly.
FACILITY.PROPERTY_DESC: A full suite of services to support your operations and the well-being of your occupants.
FACILITY.TRANSPORT_DESC: Seamless management of parking and vehicle flow to enhance safety and efficiency.
FACILITY.OUTDOOR_DESC: Professional landscape and groundskeeping services to maintain your facility's exterior appearance.

INFRA.TITLE: Infrastructure Solutions
INFRA.DESC: Many building managers overlook the potential for significant savings and efficiency gains. SECO GROUPE provides a strategic roadmap with a clear financial plan, expert execution, and long-term operational support to secure your facility's future.
INFRA.OPERATIONS_DESC: Proactive and strategic oversight to ensure all systems perform at their peak.
INFRA.MODERN_DESC: Solutions for electrifying and upgrading your infrastructure for improved performance and sustainability.
INFRA.HVAC_DESC: Expert care for your heating, cooling, and ventilation to ensure comfort and air quality.
INFRA.CRITICAL_DESC: We manage and optimize your core building infrastructure to prevent downtime and waste.

INDUSTRIES.TITLE: Industries We Serve
INDUSTRIES.DESC: Delivering exceptional solutions across diverse sectors with expertise and dedication.

ADVANTAGES.TITLE: Our Competitive Advantages
ADVANTAGES.DESC: What sets us apart and makes us your trusted partner.
ADVANTAGES.EXCELLENCE_DESC: We are committed to delivering the highest standards of quality in every project we undertake. Our team of experienced professionals brings expertise, attention to detail, and a dedication to excellence that ensures superior results. We don't just meet expectations—we exceed them, consistently providing services that stand out in the industry.
ADVANTAGES.CUSTOMER_DESC: Your success is our priority. We build lasting relationships through personalized service, clear communication, and a genuine commitment to understanding and fulfilling your unique needs. Our track record speaks for itself, with satisfied clients who trust us time and again. We measure our success by your satisfaction and work tirelessly to earn your confidence.
ADVANTAGES.SUPPORT_DESC: We're here for you around the clock, every day of the year. Our dedicated support team is available 24/7 to address your concerns, handle emergencies, and provide the assistance you need whenever you need it. With our rapid response times and always-available service, you can have peace of mind knowing we're just a call away, day or night.

WORK.TITLE: Our Work
WORK.DESC: Explore some of our recent projects and success stories

CLIENTS.TITLE: Our Clients
CLIENTS.DESC: We are proud to collaborate with trusted partners and clients who believe in our vision.

CONTACT.TITLE: Get In Touch
CONTACT.DESC: Ready to start your project? Contact us today and let's discuss how we can help your business grow.
CONTACT.NAME: Your Name

FOOTER.TITLE: A new vision for your facility

SERVICES_USA.TITLE: Hospitality Support, Building Maintenance, Janitorial & Cleaning, Staffing Solutions, Concierge & Security Experts

BACK.TITLE: Your Safety, Our Priority
BACK.DESC: Comprehensive protection tailored to your peace of mind. From elite manned guarding to advanced surveillance solutions, we provide a secure environment for your assets, employees, and premises.

BACK.TITLE: Preserving Your Property's Excellence
BACK.DESC: We ensure your infrastructure operates at peak performance. Our proactive maintenance services cover MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing), civil works, and general repairs to extends the life of your facility.

BACK.TITLE: Empowering Your Business with Right Talent
BACK.DESC: Finding the right fit shouldn't be a challenge. We provide qualified, pre-vetted professionals across various industries, ensuring your team has the support it needs to scale and succeed.

BACK.TITLE: Impeccable Standards for Every Space
BACK.DESC: Experience a higher level of cleanliness. Our housekeeping team specializes in detailed care for residential and commercial spaces, ensuring a pristine environment that reflects your commitment to quality.

BACK.TITLE: Cleanliness Built on Consistency
BACK.DESC: We handle the heavy lifting of facility hygiene. Our janitorial services focus on high-traffic sanitation and deep-cleaning protocols to keep your workspace healthy, safe, and professional around the clock.

BACK.TITLE: The First Impression Your Brand Deserves
BACK.DESC: Elevate your guest experience with professional front-of-house services. Our concierge team combines hospitality with efficiency, managing inquiries and arrivals with grace and sophistication.

HERO_SECTION.TITLE: Your Trusted Partner in Facility and Staff Management
HERO_SECTION.DESC: Seco Groupe is a full-service facility management provider operating in the United States, Canada, and the Caribbean, dedicated to maintaining the functionality, safety, and cleanliness of commercial and residential properties. We specialize in integrated facility management, combining a variety of services to streamline operations and reduce overhead costs for our clients.

SERVICE1.TITLE: Janitorial & Cleaning
SERVICE1.DESC: Beyond simply cleaning, our services ensure a healthy, productive, and welcoming environment for your employees and clients.

CARD1.TITLE: Pristine Environments
CARD1.DESC: Daily, weekly, or custom cleaning schedules tailored to your facility's needs—from offices and commercial spaces to industrial sites.

CARD2.TITLE: Health & Safety Focus
CARD2.DESC: Use of industry-leading practices and eco-friendly products to promote a sterile environment and reduce the spread of germs.

CARD3.TITLE: Specialized Care
CARD3.DESC: Deep cleaning, floor care (stripping, waxing, buffing), window cleaning, and waste management.

SERVICE2.TITLE: Building Maintenance
SERVICE2.DESC: Protecting your investment requires proactive and expert maintenance. We keep your infrastructure running smoothly and efficiently.

CARD1.TITLE: Preventative Maintenance
CARD1.DESC: Regular inspections and maintenance of essential building systems to minimize unexpected breakdowns and costly repairs.

CARD2.TITLE: General Repairs
CARD2.DESC: Handyman services including minor plumbing, electrical, carpentry, drywall, and painting.

CARD3.TITLE: HVAC & Equipment Oversight
CARD3.DESC: Coordination and basic maintenance checks for heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and other facility equipment.

CARD4.TITLE: Groundskeeping (Optional highlight)
CARD4.DESC: Keeping the exterior professional and well-maintained.

SERVICE3.TITLE: Staffing Solutions
SERVICE3.DESC: When you need specialized help fast, our staffing division provides vetted, trained, and reliable personnel to fill essential roles within your facility or organization.

CARD1.TITLE: Flexible Staffing
CARD1.DESC: Temporary, temp-to-hire, and direct placement services to meet fluctuating demands.

CARD2.TITLE: Vetted Professionals
CARD2.DESC: We handle all recruitment, screening, background checks, and initial training to ensure high-quality candidates.

CARD3.TITLE: Focus Areas
CARD3.DESC: Provision of staff for all our core service areas (janitorial, maintenance, security, and concierge roles).

SERVICE4.TITLE: Outdoor Care
SERVICE4.DESC: Elevate the experience for residents, tenants, and visitors with professional, hospitable, and highly effective concierge support.

CARD1.TITLE: First Impressions
CARD1.DESC: Highly trained, polished, and friendly personnel serving as the welcoming face of your building.

CARD2.TITLE: Operational Support
CARD2.DESC: Managing front desk operations, package handling, visitor registration, access control, and amenity bookings.

CARD3.TITLE: Customized Service
CARD3.DESC: Acting as a central hub for information and assistance, tailored to the specific needs of residential, corporate, or luxury properties.

SERVICE5.TITLE: Security & Concierge
SERVICE5.DESC: Protecting your assets, people, and property is our paramount commitment. Our security experts provide a powerful blend of technology and human presence.

CARD1.TITLE: 24/7 Protection
CARD1.DESC: Trained and licensed security guards for static guarding, mobile patrols, and access control.

CARD2.TITLE: Risk Assessment
CARD2.DESC: Comprehensive security audits to identify vulnerabilities and implement strategic protection plans.

CARD3.TITLE: Integrated Solutions
CARD3.DESC: Deployment of advanced security technology, including surveillance (CCTV), alarm monitoring, and state-of-the-art access systems.

CARD4.TITLE: Emergency Response
CARD4.DESC: Professional handling of security incidents, emergency situations, and immediate response coordination.

SERVICE6.TITLE: Hospitality Support
SERVICE6.DESC: Beyond simply cleaning, our services ensure a healthy, productive, and welcoming environment for your employees and clients.

CARD1.TITLE: Pristine Environments
CARD1.DESC: Daily, weekly, or custom cleaning schedules tailored to your facility's needs—from offices and commercial spaces to industrial sites.

CARD2.TITLE: Health & Safety Focus
CARD2.DESC: Use of industry-leading practices and eco-friendly products to promote a sterile environment and reduce the spread of germs.

CARD3.TITLE: Specialized Care
CARD3.DESC: Deep cleaning, floor care (stripping, waxing, buffing), window cleaning, and waste management.

SECTION_CLIENTS.TITLE: Our Clients
SECTION_CLIENTS.DESC: We are proud to collaborate with trusted partners and clients who believe in our vision.

hiring.title: Join {{companyName}}
hiring.description: We are looking for motivated and committed talents. Browse our job openings and download recruitment notices.

card1.title: Accountant
card1.description: Financial management, tracking accounting operations, and producing reliable reports.

card2.title: Graphic Designer
card2.description: Creating modern visuals to strengthen the company's visual identity.

card3.title: Sales Representative
card3.description: Developing the client portfolio and promoting services.

card4.title: Recruiter
card4.description: Identifying and selecting talents, managing the recruitment process.

section3.title: Want to join our team?
section3.description: Apply today and become part of SECOGROUPE.
